flavor: "Next you will learn how it feels to be butchered."
name: Gorr The God Butcher
text: Forced Response: After a player's deck runs out of cards, Gorr the God Butcher activates against them.

flavor: "Next you will learn how it feels to be butchered."
name: Gorr The God Butcher
text: When Revealed: Deal each player 1 facedown encounter card. Forced Response: After a player's deck runs out of cards, Gorr the God Butcher activates against them.

name: Gorr The God Butcher
text: When Revealed: Advance the main scheme to stage 3A. Discard the top 5 cards of each player's deck. Forced Response: After a player's deck runs out of cards, Gorr the God Butcher activates against them.

name: Deicide
text: Contents: Gorr the God Butcher (I) and Gorr the God Butcher (II). (Gorr the God Butcher (II) and Gorr the God Butcher (III) instead for expert mode.) Gorr the God Butcher, Necroverse, and Standard encounter sets. One additional modular encounter set (recommended: Intergalactic Hazards). Setup: Set the Necroverse modular encounter set, the Necro-Raven Gestalt minion, the double-sided Godbomb environment, and all copies of Heroes' Labor and Stalking Berserker aside, out of play. Advance to stage 1B.

name: Deicide
text: Forced Response: After step 1 of the villain phase, if the villain's stage number is 2 or 3, place 1 plan counter here. Then, if there are 3 or more plan counters here, advance to stage 2A. Forced Response: After Gorr the God Butcher defeats an ally, place 1 threat on this scheme.

flavor: Gorr's plan is revealed. He's coerced a god of bombs to construct a massive bomb, and using the stolen power of time gods, he plans to detonate it. Across space, across all time, all gods will die.
name: Make Ready The Bomb
text: When Revealed: Put the set-aside Godbomb environment into play. Shuffle 1 copy of the Heroes' Labor treachery into each player's deck. Advance to stage 2B.

name: Make Ready The Bomb
text: Forced Response: After step 1 of the villain phase, place 1 [per_hero] timer counters on the Godbomb environment. Forced Response: After an enemy attacks and defeats an ally, place 1 timer counter on the Godbomb environment. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor: The god who is not a god has given himself over entirely to the All-Black Necroblade.
name: Welcome To Darkness
text: When Revealed: If the Godbomb environment is in play, remove all timer counters from it and flip it to its All-Black Necroverse side. Otherwise, put the set-aside All-Black Necroverse environment into play. Shuffle the set-aside Necroverse modular encounter set into the encounter deck. Shuffle 1 copy of the Stalking Berserker minion into each player's deck.

name: Welcome To Darkness
text: Forced Response: After a player's deck runs out of cards, place 4 necro counters on the All-Black Necroverse environment. Hero Action: Discard 1 card from your hand at random → remove 1 necro counter from All-Black Necroverse. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

name: Godbomb
text: If there are 12 [per_hero] or more timer counters here, the players lose the game. Hero Action: Discard an ally you control → remove 1 timer counter from here.

name: All-black Necroverse
text:
While All-Black Necroverse has the following number of necro counters:
• 3[per_hero]: Gorr the God Butcher's attacks gain overkill.
• 6[per_hero]: All [[Necroverse]] enemies get +1 ATK.
• 9[per_hero]: All [[Necroverse]] enemies get +1 SCH.
• 12[per_hero]: The players lose the game.

name: Necro-raven Gestalt
text: Guard. Patrol. Forced Interrupt: When Necro-Raven Gestalt would be defeated, instead of discarding it, set it aside, out of play instead.

flavor: "This is not my killer. This is his guard dog. His very strong guard dog."
name: Black Berserker
text:
Patrol.
[star] Black Berserker gets +X hit points, where X is the number of [[Necroverse]] attachments in play (to a maximum of 4).

name: Necro-raven
text:
Incite 1. Surge. Forced Response: After Necro-Raven enters play, discard the top card of your deck. Then, if there are 3 copies of Necro-Raven in play, discard them and summon the Necro-Raven Gestalt minion and put it into play engaged with you.
[star] Boost: Put Necro-Raven into play engaged with you.

name: Blighted Chains
text: Attach to your identity. As an additional cost to use a hero's basic power, you must discard 1 random card from your hand. Alter-Ego Action: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck → discard this card.

name: Mind-hewn Blade
text: Attach to Gorr the God Butcher. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Gorr the God Butcher attacks you, discard the top 2 cards of your deck. This attack gains piercing. Hero Action: Take 2 indirect damage and discard the top 2 cards of your deck → discard this card.

name: Umbral Wings
text: Attach to Gorr the God Butcher. Forced Interrupt: When Gorr the God Butcher is dealt damage, reduce that damage by 1. Hero Action: Discard 2 cards from your hand and the top 2 cards of your deck → discard this card.

name: Vicious Tendrils
text: Attach to Gorr the God Butcher. Gorr the God Butcher gains retaliate 1. [star] Gorr the God Butcher's attacks gain ranged. Hero Action: Discard 1 card at random from your hand and discard the top 4 cards of your deck → discard this card.

name: Anti-dogma
text:
When Revealed: Gorr the God Butcher schemes. Place 2 threat on the main scheme or discard the top 2 cards of your deck.
[star] Boost: Place 2 threat on the main scheme or discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

name: Brutal Cunning
text: Peril. When Revealed: Choose one: • Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until you discard a [[Necroverse]] attachment. Reveal that card. • Shuffle the bottommost [[Necroverse]] attachment in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. This card gains surge.

name: Gleeful Savagery
text:
When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Take 1 indirect damage. This card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): Gorr the God Butcher attacks you. Take 2 indirect damage or discard the top 2 cards of your deck.
[star] Boost: Take 2 indirect damage or discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

flavor: Everywhere you go, you find the trail of deities' corpses that Gorr has left behind.
name: Forgotten Gods
text:
Forced Response: When the villain phase ends, deal each player 1 indirect damage.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: On a backwoods planet, an alien boy looks up at the morning sky, and watches the sun turn black.
name: Nihilistic Vision
text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an attachment is discarded. Reveal that card. All [[Necroverse]] enemies (including Gorr the God Butcher) get +1 ATK.

flavor: Even if Gorr kills all the gods in creation, there will still be one god left standing.
name: You Are My God
text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Forced Response: After Gorr the God Butcher attacks, he attacks again. Deal him no boost cards for this attack. (Limit once per player per phase.)

name: Heroes' Labor
text: Incite 1. Forced Response: After you draw Heroes' Labor or discard it from the top of your deck, reveal it. When Revealed: Place 1 timer counter on the Godbomb environment, if able. Otherwise, place 1 necro counter on the All-Black Necroverse environment. Put this card into your discard pile (instead of discarding it to the encounter discard pile).

name: Stalking Berserker
text: Forced Response: After you draw Stalking Berserker or discard it from the top of your deck, reveal it. Forced Response: After your turn ends, discard the top 2 cards of your deck and place 1 necro counter on the All-Black Necroverse environment. When Defeated: Put this card into the engaged player's discard pile.

flavor: "I feel them... drowning. Feel the blackness flooding them."
name: Shadow Serpent
text:
[star] Shadow Serpent's attacks gain overkill.
[star] Boost: Deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card.

name: Annihilablade
text: Attach to the villain. [star] Forced Interrupt: When the villain's attack would defeat an ally, remove that ally from the game instead of discarding it. Hero Action: Spend [physical] [mental] [energy] resources and discard the top 5 cards of your deck → discard this card.

name: Dark Apotheosis
text: Attach to the enemy with the most hit points remaining. Hero Action: Spend [physical] [mental] resources and discard the top 3 cards of your deck → discard this card.

name: Manifest Will
text: When Revealed: Shuffle all minions in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a minion is discarded. Reveal that card.

name: The Ingenuity Of Hatred
text: When Revealed: Shuffle all attachments in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an attachment is discarded. Reveal that card.

flavor: The final doom of all gods is Gorr's weapon in its truest form. The Annihilablade hangs over us all.
name: The Planet Cleaver
text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When facedown encounter cards are dealt to players during the villain phase, deal each player 1 additional facedown encounter card.

flavor: Your antagonist is well connected, but these hired guns won't stop you.
name: Bounty Hunter
text: Patrol. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Bounty Hunter attacks, if you are confused, they get +2 ATK for this attack.

name: Solar Flare
text:
When Revealed: If you are confused, take 3 indirect damage. Otherwise, you are confused.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "I hate to say it, but I think we're lost." —Star-Lord
name: Turned Around
text: When Revealed: You are confused. Then, choose an engaged minion, if able. That enemy attacks you.

name: Asteroid Belt
text: Uses (2 [per_hero] asteroid counters). Forced Response: After the end of the player phase, each player takes 2 indirect damage. Hero Action: Exhaust your hero → remove X asteroid counters from here, where X is the highest of your ATK, THW, or DEF.
